chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 对话韶音高层：开放式耳机，凭什么成为下一场颠覆TWS的“品类革命”？
chinese_news.summary:
从运动孤岛到品类革命：解构韶音的“开放式”野心与底层技术硬实力

在消费电子行业普遍面临增长红利见顶的今天，音频赛道却正在上演一场深刻的结构性变革。2026年5月15日下午，大雨初晴的深圳湾广场，Shokz韶音举办了备受瞩目的媒体专访会。韶音中国区CEO杨云与产品线总裁张浩锋悉数到场，向外界系统阐述了这家以“骨传导”和“运动”起家的品牌，如何在稳坐全球开放式耳机出货量第一王座的同时，向更广阔的泛场景音频帝国发起攻坚。

过去两年，开放式耳机在中国蓝牙耳机市场的整体销售额份额已率先突破30%。这不仅是一次产品形态的更迭，更是一场由韶音引领、正在席卷全球的“品类级替代”风暴。

一、 宏观战略与行业洞察：以“全场景品类替代”重塑全球音频版图

过去，大众对韶音的认知多停留在“专业运动”与“骨传导”这两个标签上。然而，在本次专访中，韶音高层明确指出，专业运动与泛场景用户从来不是一道非此即彼的选择题。韶音正在做的事情，是将用户的定义从最初的“专业运动人群”彻底拓展到“每一个需要开放聆听的用户”。

示意图

自4月初以来，立讯精密股价上涨超过55%。

5月11日，立讯精密市值创下历史新高，达到了5542亿人民币。立讯精密掌舵者王来春持股18.75%，身价也突破了千亿人民币，成为国内白手起家的又一位千亿女富豪。

如果说4月以来的涨幅，是因为立讯精密“站在光里”，短期股价大涨或许与一则收购公告有关。

5月10日，公告显示立讯精密拟通过收购京西智行集团全部股权，间接拿下京西国际约59.50%股份，有望成为其最终控股股东。这是立讯精密继两年前收购德国莱尼后，在汽车领域的又一关

chinese_news.summary:
肯德基

作者 | 王涛

编辑 | 吾人

来源 | 融中财经

路透社报道，怡和集团正打算卖掉自己手里经营了十多年的快餐相关资产，这部分资产里，包含了香港、澳门、台湾、缅甸、越南这五个市场的肯德基和必胜客门店，再加上香港本土的外卖披萨品牌PHD，加起来大概有1000家门店、2.5万名员工，这笔交易的金额差不多有4亿美元（折合人民币28亿左右）；非约束性报价的截止时间就在本周，而参与竞购的买方阵容也挺有意思，有百胜中国、凯雷集团、台湾统一企业，还有好几家私募基金。</

SpaceX

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 宠物健康大模型公司连融两轮，软硬一体化布局，已服务超200家宠物医院
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，宠物大模型健康公司重庆绮算法科技有限公司（以下简称“绮算法”）、智谱“Z计划”生态企业，近日完成数千万元融资，投资方为启赋资本与聚恒创投。本轮资金将主要用于产品迭代、模型能力深化及市场拓展。

绮算法成立于2022年7月，是一家聚焦宠物健康领域的大模型科技公司。依托多模态大模型能力，公司已打造一个融合线上线下、软硬件协同的宠物健康品牌。

绮算法创始人陈立毕业于英国国王学院，为Qlalgorithm Lab研究员，同时也是连续创业者；技术合伙人刘煜东为宾夕法尼亚大学博士，长期从事AI医疗方向研究；另一位技术合伙人邓子豪毕业于宾夕法尼亚大学，专注于新一代边缘计算技术。

此前，在智谱专业模型能力与“小暖医生”业务资源支持下，公司已围绕宠物医疗场景搭建起一套垂直化、可落地的AI模型体系。

宠物医疗领域，由于缺乏系统化的循证数据，加上宠物无法主动表达症状，诊断难度较高

chinese_news.title: 48022桌需退款，这家网红店出了什么事？
chinese_news.summary:
“由于您吃到的只是‘烤熟的羊肉串’，而不是‘最佳状态的羊肉串’，我们内心感到惭愧，所以原路‘退回首轮烤制一半羊肉串的钱’作为补偿。”

近日，不少网友在社交平台发文称，收到了“很久以前羊肉串”的部分退款及一条道歉短信。

图源：很久以前官方账号

据窄门餐眼数据，“很久以前羊肉串”开有142家门店，其中九成为商场店。羊肉串是其核心单品，门店特色是统一使用自动旋转电烤炉，消费者可自行动手翻面、完成烤制。

然而，此次退款事件的问题恰恰出在电烤炉上。

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC and short duration fixed-income (via long DXY, short 10Y Treasury) on Hormuz closure geopolitical premium and macro rate-lock divergence.
supporting_signals: CNBC: G7 finance ministers warning of Hormuz economic consequences; long-term borrowing costs surge
CNBC: Bond market flashing Iran warning; Daleep Singh sees energy-geopolitics trouble ahead
CoinDesk: BTC slide to $78k-$79k on macro fears and fixed-income outflows—suggests rate expectations repricing
investment_theses.counter_view: If Hormuz clears or geopolitical tension de-escalates (e.g., Trump diplomacy win), carry trades unwind and BTC corrects deeper; DXY rally stalls.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perps (Bybit, Deribit) + Long DXY (or short TLT) as macro hedge

investment_theses.thesis: Long Solana (SOL) relative to Bitcoin on Firedancer rollout timeline and Japan institutional crypto trust demand, betting infrastructure upgrade plus mega-bank entry drives SOL/BTC ratio higher.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Jump Crypto's Firedancer taking 'slow and steady' approach; SOL down 5% on macro slide but positioned for Q2 rebound
Cointelegraph + CoinDesk: SBI, Rakuten, Nomura launching crypto investment trusts; historically retail+institutional inflows favor high-TVL L1s
Hacker News + 36Kr: AI coding agents (Zerostack, Claude Code) trending—Solana dev ecosystem expanding, may attract builder capital
investment_theses.counter_view: Firedancer delays push rollout into late 2026; Ethereum's Shanghai upgrades and institutional trust offerings prove more credible; SOL reputational risk (FTX) lingers.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL/BTC ratio via perpetual futures; or spot long SOL if institutional trust appetite confirmed

investment_theses.thesis: Underweight mega-cap AI (NVDA, GOOG) vs. early-stage AI infrastructure (select small/mid-cap semiconductor, edge compute) on consensus inversion: AI layoffs + analyst caution signal peak-hype, but programmable Bitcoin (VerifiedX) and DeFi infrastructure (Firedancer, crypto trusts) unleash new compute-demand vectors.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'AI-related layoffs a boost for stocks? Not necessarily'—uncomfortable reality; analyst tone cooling despite earnings strength
CoinDesk: VerifiedX bets Bitcoin's next chapter is programmable and private; Japan institutional crypto trust demand for infrastructure plays
CNBC: Berkshire's Greg Abel dumping mega-cap holdings; suggests insider caution on large-cap tech valuations
investment_theses.counter_view: NVIDIA earnings beat, strong guidance prove AI infrastructure tailwinds are durable; consensus caution is capitulation buying opportunity; mega-cap tech re-rates higher.
investment_theses.expression: Short NVDA, Long semiconductor ETF (SMH) tilted toward smaller-cap edge compute / ASIC plays; or sector rotation into MU, Broadcom on Bitcoin compute thesis

investment_theses.thesis: Long XRP vs. Ethereum on U.S. CLARITY Act passage probability and Ripple's regulatory-moat narrative, betting Congress action de-risks XRP classification and unlocks institutional issuance volume.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: XRP beat Bitcoin on Clarity Act advancement; XRP now trading on regulatory clarity narrative vs. Ethereum's tech narrative
Cointelegraph: A16z declares Clarity Act a 'boon for domestic innovation'—signals lobbying coordination and credible passage momentum
36Kr + CoinDesk: Japan institutional players (SBI) entering crypto via trusts; XRP liquidity and stablecoin use cases benefit from regulatory clarity
investment_theses.counter_view: Clarity Act stalls in Congress; geopolitical risk (China, Iran, Taiwan) deprioritizes crypto regulation; Ethereum's DeFi dominance proves more durable than XRP issuance thesis.
investment_theses.expression: Long XRP/ETH pair ratio via spot or perps; or outright long XRP if CLARITY Act passage probability >60% by July 2026

investment_theses.thesis: Long Italian equities (EWI, or Italian bank + fintech names) on institutional crypto adoption signal (largest bank doubles holdings to $235M Q1) and EU regulatory clarity creating competitive advantage vs. US restriction regime.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Italy's largest bank more than doubles crypto holdings to $235M in Q1—first major European institution disclosure this cycle
CNBC + CoinDesk: US CLARITY Act still pending; Europe (especially Southern Europe) moving faster on stablecoin/fintech frameworks
36Kr: Zerostacks, Claude Code, AI-agent tooling trending in developer communities—Italy's fintech infrastructure beneficiary if open APIs accelerate
investment_theses.counter_view: Italy's sovereign debt concerns, ECB rate headwinds, and political fragility undermine equity performance; crypto holdings prove to be P&L drag if BTC corrects.
investment_theses.expression: Long EWI (Italy equity ETF) or direct long Italian bank equities if crypto holdings disclosure trend continues
